# Code of Conduct

Ciano is maintained by a single developer.

Please keep discussions respectful and constructive.

## Expected Behavior

- Be polite and respectful.
- Focus on technical discussions.
- Provide clear and objective feedback.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment or personal attacks.
- Discriminatory language.
- Spam or unrelated content.

## Enforcement

As the project maintainer, I reserve the right to remove comments, issues, or contributions that do not follow these guidelines.

Thank you for helping keep the project healthy.
